case_title: ROBERT E. GORDON VS. RACHELLE GOODFRIEND

PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOTIFED THE COURT THAT SHE IS UNABLE TO APPEAR DUE TO A CAR ACCIDENT, NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-26-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT STATES THIS IS THE LAST CONTINUANCE JUDGE BRUCE E. COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $127.43 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $44.50 ACCRUED INTEREST, $45.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF GORDON, ROBERT E.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. FILED BY GOODFRIEND, RACHELLE DBA GOODFRIEND DESIGN GROUP

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY RACHELLE GOODFRIEND IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $50.00 OR MORE ON THE 1ST BUSINESS DAY OF EVERY MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 506 IS RESET TO MAY-01-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 514 BEFORE HONORABLE BRUCE E. CHAN, CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GORDON, ROBERT E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODFRIEND, RACHELLE DBA GOODFRIEND DESIGN GROUP $1,827.97 PRINCIPAL, $109.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,937.47, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
